# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent envoy no tls.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

inline_string: |
                          function envoy_on_request(request_handle)
                            -- Remove internal headers that should not be set by external clients
                            request_handle:headers():remove("x-envoy-original-dst-host")
                            request_handle:headers():remove("x-envoy-internal")
                            request_handle:headers():remove("x-forwarded-client-cert")

                            -- Enforce maximum request body size (10MB)
                            local content_length = request_handle:headers():get("content-length")
                            if content_length then
                              local size = tonumber(content_length)
                              if size and size > 10485760 then
                                request_handle:respond(
                                  {[":status"] = "413"},
                                  "Request entity too large"
                                )
                                return
                              end
                            end
                          end

                          function envoy_on_response(response_handle)
                            -- Add security headers
                            response_handle:headers():add("x-content-type-options", "nosniff")
                            response_handle:headers():add("x-frame-options", "DENY")
                            response_handle:headers():add("strict-transport-security", "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload")
                            response_handle:headers():add("x-xss-protection", "1; mode=block")
                            response_handle:headers():add("referrer-policy", "strict-origin-when-cross-origin")
                            response_handle:headers():add("content-security-policy", "default-src 'self'")
                            -- Remove server identification headers
                            response_handle:headers():remove("server")
                            response_handle:headers():remove("x-powered-by")
                          end
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
                      suppress_envoy_headers: true
                route_config:
                  name: api_routes
                  virtual_hosts:
                    - name: api_services
                      domains:
                        - "api.example.com"
                      require_tls: ALL
                      request_headers_to_remove:
                        - x-envoy-decorator-operation
                      retry_policy:
                        retry_on: "5xx,reset,connect-failure,retriable-status-codes"
                        num_retries: 2
                        per_try_timeout: 5s
                        retry_back_off:
                          base_interval: 0.25s
                          max_interval: 1s
                        retriable_status_codes:
                          - 503
                          - 502
                      routes:
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/users"
                            headers:
                              - name: ":method"
                                string_match:
                                  safe_regex:
                                    regex: "^(GET|POST|PUT|DELETE|PATCH)$"
                          route:
                            cluster: users_service
                            timeout: 15s
                            idle_timeout: 60s
                            prefix_rewrite: "/v1/users"
                            rate_limits:
                              - actions:
                                  - remote_address: {}
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/orders"
                            headers:
                              - name: ":method"
                                string_match:
                                  safe_regex:
                                    regex: "^(GET|POST|PUT|DELETE|PATCH)$"
                          route:
                            cluster: orders_service
                            timeout: 20s
                            idle_timeout: 60s
                            prefix_rewrite: "/v1/orders"
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/products"
                            headers:
                              - name: ":method"
                                string_match:
                                  safe_regex:
                                    regex: "^(GET|POST|PUT|DELETE|PATCH)$"
                          route:
                            cluster: products_service
                            timeout: 15s
                            idle_timeout: 60s
                            prefix_rewrite: "/v1/products"
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/auth"
                            headers:
                              - name: ":method"
                                string_match:
                                  safe_regex:
                                    regex: "^(POST)$"
                          route:
                            cluster: auth_service
                            timeout: 10s
                            idle_timeout: 30s
                            prefix_rewrite: "/v1/auth"
                      # Catch-all route returns 404 for unmatched paths
                    - name: catch_all
                      domains:
                        - "*"
                      routes:
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/"
                          direct_response:
                            status: 421
                            body:
                              inline_string: '{"error": "misdirected request"}'

    # HTTP to HTTPS redirect listener on port 80
    - name: http_redirect_listener
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: 0.0.0.0
          port_value: 80
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                stat_prefix: http_redirect
                codec_type: AUTO
                normalize_path: true
                merge_slashes: true
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
                route_config:
                  name: redirect_to_https
                  virtual_hosts:
                    - name: redirect_all
                      domains:
                        - "*"
                      routes:
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/"
                          redirect:
                            https_redirect: true
                            response_code: MOVED_PERMANENTLY

  clusters:
    - name: users_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      connect_timeout: 5s
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 32768
      transport_socket:
        name: envoy.transport_sockets.tls
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.UpstreamTlsContext
          common_tls_params:
            tls_minimum_protocol_version: TLSv1_2
            tls_maximum_protocol_version: TLSv1_3
          sni: users-service.internal.example.com
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: users_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: users-service.internal.example.com
                      port_value: 8443
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: users-service-2.internal.example.com
                      port_value: 8443
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 512
            max_pending_requests: 256
            max_requests: 1024
            max_retries: 3
            track_remaining: true
          - priority: HIGH
            max_connections: 1024
            max_pending_requests: 512
            max_requests: 2048
            max_retries: 5
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http2_protocol_options:
              max_concurrent_streams: 100
              initial_stream_window_size: 65536
              initial_connection_window_size: 1048576
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 300s
            max_headers_count: 100
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 5s
          interval: 10s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          no_traffic_interval: 30s
          no_traffic_healthy_interval: 60s
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            host: users-service.internal.example.com
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 200
          event_log_path: /var/log/envoy/health_check_users.log
      outlier_detection:
        consecutive_5xx: 5
        interval: 10s
        base_ejection_time: 30s
        max_ejection_percent: 50
        enforcing_consecutive_5xx: 100
        enforcing_success_rate: 100
        success_rate_minimum_hosts: 3
        success_rate_request_volume: 100
        success_rate_stdev_factor: 1900

    - name: orders_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      lb_policy: LEAST_REQUEST
      connect_timeout: 5s
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 32768
      transport_socket:
        name: envoy.transport_sockets.tls
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.UpstreamTlsContext
          common_tls_params:
            tls_minimum_protocol_version: TLSv1_2
            tls_maximum_protocol_version: TLSv1_3
          sni: orders-service.internal.example.com
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: orders_service
        endpoints:

                  address:

                      address: orders-service.internal.example.com
                      port_value: 8443
              - endpoint:
                  address:

                      address: orders-service-2.internal.example.com

          - priority: DEFAULT

      typed_extension_protocol_options:

          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions

              max_concurrent_streams: 100
              initial_stream_window_size: 65536
              initial_connection_window_size: 1048576
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 300s
            max_headers_count: 100
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 5s
          interval: 10s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          no_traffic_interval: 30s
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            host: orders-service.internal.example.com
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 200
          event_log_path: /var/log/envoy/health_check_orders.log
      outlier_detection:
        consecutive_5xx: 5
        interval: 10s
        base_ejection_time: 30s
        max_ejection_percent: 50
        enforcing_consecutive_5xx: 100

    - name: products_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      connect_timeout: 5s
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 32768
      transport_socket:
        name: envoy.transport_sockets.tls
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.UpstreamTlsContext

    - name: auth_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      connect_timeout: 3s
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 16384
      transport_socket:
        name: envoy.transport_sockets.tls
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.UpstreamTlsContext

            max_connections: 256
            max_pending_requests: 128
            max_requests: 512
            max_retries: 2
            track_remaining: true
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http2_protocol_options:
              max_concurrent_streams: 50
              initial_stream_window_size: 65536
              initial_connection_window_size: 1048576
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 120s
            max_headers_count: 100
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 3s
          interval: 5s
          unhealthy_threshold: 2
          healthy_threshold: 2
          no_traffic_interval: 15s
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            host: auth-service.internal.example.com
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 200
          event_log_path: /var/log/envoy/health_check_auth.log
      outlier_detection:
        consecutive_5xx: 3
        interval: 5s
        base_ejection_time: 15s
        max_ejection_percent: 30
        enforcing_consecutive_5xx: 100

overload_manager:
  refresh_interval: 0.25s
  resource_monitors:
    - name: envoy.resource_monitors.fixed_heap
      typed_config:
        "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.resource_monitors.fixed_heap.v3.FixedHeapConfig
        max_heap_size_bytes: 2147483648
  actions:
    - name: envoy.overload_actions.shrink_heap
      triggers:
        - name: envoy.resource_monitors.fixed_heap
          threshold:
            value: 0.90
    - name: envoy.overload_actions.stop_accepting_requests
      triggers:
        - name: envoy.resource_monitors.fixed_heap
          threshold:
            value: 0.95

layered_runtime:
  layers:
    - name: static_layer
      static_layer:
        envoy.reloadable_features.strict_header_validation: true
        overload.global_downstream_max_connections: 50000
